meaning: n.发出噪音的东西,强烈的打击
examples: Let me tell you a rip snorter about a farmer and his cow.
Tremlett then bowled a snorter at Sachin Tendulkar to have him caught at short leg nine runs from their target.
Tendulkar was immediately in all sorts of trouble, struck on the helmet by another snorter from Shoaib and Laxman was lucky when he edged the "Rawalpindi Express" between keeper and first slip.
